scripts.dev: docker compose up -d; concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:tunnel: docker compose up -d; concurrently "npm run dev:server" "VITE_HOST=true npm run dev:client" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.start:build: npm run build -w @r2/shared && npm run build -w @r2/server && npm run build -w @r2/supervisor && npm start
